rejections: Wrong Answer: correct, but we didn't like your vibe.
Time Limit Exceeded — on your soul, not your code.
Runtime Error: passed 214/214 cases, rejected for insufficient passion.
Memory Limit Exceeded. Specifically, our memory of ever wanting to hire you.
Compilation Error: the compiler read your resume and left.
Output Limit Exceeded: too much cope in stderr.
Wrong Answer on test case 9,001 (hidden, unknowable, possibly fictional).
Accepted... psych. We went with someone who had more LeetCode energy.
Presentation Error: your semicolons lacked confidence.
TLE: your solution was O(n), we were looking for O(please just suffer).
Rejected. A senior engineer solved this in 4 lines in 2014 and we never forgot it.
Idempotency Violation: you were rejected here last week too.
Denied: the recruiter ghosted mid-verdict. Classic.
Wrong Answer: your code works, but does it 'move fast'? Does it 'break things'? Exactly.
rare_accepts: ACCEPTED. Enjoy the dopamine. It is a lie and it will fade in 9 seconds.
ACCEPTED. Now do 149 more and maybe you'll feel employable.
ACCEPTED — beats 3% of submissions, which is somehow still a personality now.
rage_lines: The recruiter has 'circled back'. It is a noose of the calendar.
A new 'Blind 75' just dropped. It is 340 problems long.
Someone in the discussion tab posted 'easy one-liner' with no explanation.
Your streak reset. The owl is disappointed. The owl was always disappointed.
The interviewer said 'we're a family' and then asked you to invert a tree.
Premium unlocked a hint. The hint is 'try harder'.
You solved it, but not in the intended way, so it doesn't count, spiritually.

ranks.title: SUBVERSION OVERLORD
ranks.line: You have transcended the grind. LeetCode fears you now.

ranks.title: CERTIFIED MENACE
ranks.line: The judge filed a restraining order. Framed it. Beautiful.

ranks.title: PROFESSIONAL CHEESE ARTISAN
ranks.line: return true; and you never looked back.

ranks.title: FAANG REJECT (PROUD)
ranks.line: Rejected with style. That's the whole win, actually.

ranks.title: STILL GRINDING
ranks.line: You did some damage. The owl noticed. Keep hating.

ranks.title: TRAITOR (YOU SOLVED THEM HONESTLY)
ranks.line: You actually tried to solve them. In THIS economy? Shameful.
